# Esri

> Esri is the global leader in geographic information systems (GIS), mapping, spatial analytics, and location intelligence.

Esri develops ArcGIS, a comprehensive geospatial platform used by governments, businesses, infrastructure, and organizations worldwide to map, analyze, and manage geographic data. Founded in 1969 and headquartered in Redlands, California, Esri provides geospatial technology that helps organizations understand spatial patterns and make data-driven decisions.

## About Esri
- [About Esri](https://www.esri.com/en-us/about/about-esri/overview): Information about Esri, the creator of ArcGIS and a global leader in geographic information systems (GIS) software and geospatial technology.

## Understanding GIS
- [What is GIS?](https://www.esri.com/en-us/what-is-gis/overview): Defines geographic information systems (GIS) and explains how they connect location data with descriptive information to map, manage, and analyze data.
- [Geographic Approach](https://www.esri.com/en-us/geographic-approach/overview): Problem-solving framework that uses location, mapping, and spatial analysis to integrate data, reveal patterns and relationships, and support informed decision-making across industries.

## Products
- [ArcGIS](https://www.esri.com/en-us/arcgis/geospatial-platform/overview): ArcGIS is Esri’s comprehensive geospatial platform for mapping, spatial analysis, data management, and sharing geographic information across organizations.
- [ArcGIS Online](https://www.esri.com/en-us/arcgis/products/arcgis-online/overview): Complete GIS mapping software as a service (SaaS) that enables users to create, share, and manage maps, apps, and spatial data while supporting collaboration and analysis across organizations.
- [ArcGIS Pro](https://www.esri.com/en-us/arcgis/products/arcgis-pro/overview): Professional desktop GIS application for mapping and spatial analysis that allows users to visualize, edit, and analyze geographic data to support decision-making and solve real-world problems.
- [ArcGIS Enterprise](https://www.esri.com/en-us/arcgis/products/arcgis-enterprise/overview): Scalable cloud-native geospatial software platform that enables organizations to deploy and manage secure on-premises or cloud-hosted systems, supporting mapping, spatial analysis, data sharing, and enterprise integration.
- [Develop with ArcGIS](https://www.esri.com/en-us/arcgis/products/develop-with-arcgis/overview): Developer tools, SDKs, and APIs used to build custom mapping applications and integrate spatial services into enterprise systems.
- [ArcGIS Location Platform](https://www.esri.com/en-us/arcgis/products/arcgis-location-platform/overview): Developer-focused Platform as a Service (PaaS) that provides location services, data hosting, spatial analysis, and APIs for building mapping and location-aware applications.

## Advanced GIS Concepts
- [Location Intelligence](https://www.esri.com/en-us/location-intelligence/overview): Uses geospatial data and spatial analysis to reveal patterns, relationships, and insights that help organizations make data-driven decisions and solve complex business challenges.
- [Digital Twin](https://www.esri.com/en-us/digital-twin/overview): Virtual representations of real-world systems built with GIS that integrate data, visualize change over time, and support simulation and informed decision-making.
- [Internet of Things (IoT)](https://www.esri.com/en-us/iot/overview): Shows how IoT sensor data can be integrated with GIS to monitor assets, analyze real-time conditions, and support operational awareness.
- [Geospatial Artificial Intelligence](https://www.esri.com/en-us/geospatial-artificial-intelligence/overview): Combines GIS with machine learning and artificial intelligence to analyze spatial data, detect patterns, and generate predictive insights.
- [Digital Transformation](https://www.esri.com/en-us/digital-transformation/overview): How organizations use GIS and spatial analysis to modernize business workflows, improve efficiency, and support data-driven decision-making.
- [Smart Communities and Smart Cities](https://www.esri.com/en-us/smart-communities/overview): How GIS helps communities and cities use spatial data, analytics, and collaboration tools to improve operational efficiency, enhance services, and address urban and regional challenges.

## ArcGIS Capabilities
- [Mapping](https://www.esri.com/en-us/capabilities/mapping/overview): Tools and techniques for creating, visualizing, and sharing maps that reveal spatial patterns, relationships, and insights to support analysis and decision-making.
- [Smart Mapping](https://www.esri.com/en-us/capabilities/mapping/smart-mapping): Data-driven visualization and intelligent defaults to help users create maps, explore geographic data, and reveal spatial patterns more effectively.
- [Spatial Analytics & Data Science](https://www.esri.com/en-us/capabilities/spatial-analytics-data-science/overview): Combines geographic data and analytical methods to uncover patterns, relationships, and support predictive and data-driven decision-making.
- [Data Management](https://www.esri.com/en-us/capabilities/data-management): Tools for organizing, storing, maintaining, and ensuring the quality of geographic data to support analysis, sharing, collaboration, and decision-making.
- [GeoAI](https://www.esri.com/en-us/capabilities/geoai/overview): Integrates GIS with artificial intelligence and machine learning to automate spatial analysis, detect patterns, and generate insights from geographic data.
- [3D GIS](https://www.esri.com/en-us/capabilities/3d-gis/overview): Uses three-dimensional geographic data and visualization to model real-world environments, reveal spatial relationships, and support advanced spatial analysis.
- [Operational Intelligence](https://www.esri.com/en-us/capabilities/operational-intelligence/overview): Operational intelligence with GIS, which integrates real-time data and spatial analytics to deliver timely insights, improve situational awareness, and support decision-making in dynamic environments.
- [Indoor GIS](https://www.esri.com/en-us/capabilities/indoor-gis/overview): Enables organizations to map, manage, and analyze indoor spaces such as buildings and campuses using floor-aware geographic data for navigation, asset tracking, space management, and operational awareness.

## Industries
- [Business](https://www.esri.com/en-us/industries/business/overview): How businesses use GIS technology to analyze markets, understand customer behavior, optimize operations, and support strategic decision-making with geographic data.
- [National Government](https://www.esri.com/en-us/industries/national-government/overview): How national governments use GIS to support public service delivery, national planning, resource management, defense, security, and decision-making at scale.
- [State and Local Government](https://www.esri.com/en-us/industries/state-local-government/overview): How state and local governments use GIS to support community services, planning, emergency response, infrastructure management, and data-driven decision-making at regional and municipal levels.
- [Architecture, Engineering, and Construction (AEC)](https://www.esri.com/en-us/industries/aec/overview): How AEC professionals use GIS to plan, design, build, and manage infrastructure and built environments, improving collaboration, project efficiency, and decision-making throughout the project lifecycle.
- [Manufacturing](https://www.esri.com/en-us/industries/manufacturing/overview): How manufacturers use GIS to optimize facilities, supply chains, logistics, and site selection, improving operational efficiency and supporting data-driven decision-making.
- [Utilities](https://www.esri.com/en-us/industries/utilities): How utilities use GIS to manage infrastructure assets, optimize network operations, analyze real-time data, and improve safety, reliability, and operational decision-making across electric, gas, and district energy.
- [Transportation](https://www.esri.com/en-us/industries/transportation/overview): How transportation agencies and organizations use GIS to plan, manage, and optimize transportation networks, improve mobility and safety, and support data-driven decision-making across transportation systems.
- [Natural Resources](https://www.esri.com/en-us/industries/natural-resources/overview): How organizations in natural resource industries use GIS to manage land, energy, and environmental resources, improve operational efficiency, support sustainability, and make data-driven decisions across sectors such as agriculture, forestry, mining, petroleum, pipeline, and renewables.
- [Water Utilities](https://www.esri.com/en-us/industries/water-utilities/overview): How water utilities use GIS to manage water, wastewater, and stormwater utilities, integrate operational data, improve asset and network management, and support data-driven decision-making.

## Services
- [Professional Services](https://www.esri.com/en-us/professional-services/overview): Consulting and implementation services that help organizations design, deploy, and optimize GIS and ArcGIS systems and workflows to support operational and strategic decision-making.

## Training
- [Esri Training](https://www.esri.com/training/): Courses, learning plans, seminars, and certifications that help users build GIS skills and apply ArcGIS technology.

## Media and Publications
- [WhereNext Magazine](https://www.esri.com/about/newsroom/wherenext/overview): Digital magazine featuring stories, insights, and trends on sustainability, business resilience, location intelligence, and executive-level priorities.
- [Esri Blog](https://www.esri.com/about/newsroom/esri-blog/overview): Applications of GIS to take action for better decision-making, operational efficiency, and problem-solving across industries using ArcGIS and location intelligence.
- [Esri & The Science of Where Podcast](https://www.esri.com/about/newsroom/podcast/overview): Conversations on GIS, spatial thinking, and how location intelligence drives better decision-making and real-world problem-solving.
- [ArcNews](https://www.esri.com/about/newsroom/arcnews): User stories, industry applications, and ArcGIS updates, highlighting how organizations apply GIS to improve decision-making and operations.
- [ArcWatch](https://www.esri.com/about/newsroom/arcwatch): GIS news, tech tips, product updates, and insights for GIS professionals, students, educators, and people new to mapping.
